verify.rule: Ensure all required fields are present.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to mixed materials.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal cycling tests to validate material compatibility.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient stiffness in deployer rails.
risk.mit: Perform finite element analysis to ensure adequate stiffness.

risk.desc: Risk of inadequate clearance in sliding interfaces.
risk.mit: Review and adjust clearance dimensions based on tolerance stack-up.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to complex interfaces.
risk.mit: Implement alignment aids and detailed assembly instructions.

risk.desc: Risk of overloading fasteners due to improper preload.
risk.mit: Specify and document proper preload values for all fasteners.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: 3U CubeSat primary frame, Al 7075, PC/104 standoffs, deployable rail guide grooves (CDS spec)
physics_paths: Load Path: Corner posts and rail guide grooves transfer loads from deployed solar panels and antennas to the main structure.
Flow Path: Airflow through vent holes for thermal management.
Thermal Path: Heat from electronics dissipates through the aluminum frame.
Motion Path: Rail guide grooves allow for deployment/retraction of solar panels and antennas.
Pressure Path: Internal pressure relief through vent holes.
Electrical/Data Path: PCB traces and connectors carry signals between boards.
Human/Service Access Path: Removable side panel provides access for maintenance and testing.
integration_opportunities: Add deployer mechanism for rail-guided components.
Integrate additional sensors for environmental monitoring.
Enhance thermal management with additional vent holes.

generated_parts.label: Antenna Deployer x 2
generated_parts.spec: Tape-spring UHF/S-band antenna deployer, stowed flat, burn-wire release, latching tab

requirements: Subsystem module: Antenna Deployer x 2 (fixed BOM item inside 3U CubeSat)
Tape-spring UHF/S-band antenna deployer, stowed flat, burn-wire release, latching tab
Vehicle context: 3U CubeSat (10x10x30cm) Earth-observation demonstrator
Discipline: comms - role: Antenna deployer (tape-spring dummy ok), radio board slot, RF connector path
Required evidence_features: antenna_slot, antenna_deployer, tape_spring, deploy_hinge, radio_board, rf_connector
Replaceable module path: Battery, sensor, actuator, cartridge, payload, cable, or joint modules remain removable without full teardown
Cable harness visibility: Harnesses, tubes, or service channels are routed through visible raceways or protected channels
Access not just text: Access is represented by geometry: hatch, pocket, channel, fastener pattern, slot, window, or removable cover

Harness strain relief and bend radius: Every cable exit shows strain relief geometry (clamp, grommet, tie point) and routing respects a stated minimum bend radius away from moving joints and sharp edges
Connector accessibility and keying: Connectors are reachable without disassembling structure, have finger/tool clearance, and mention keying or labeling to prevent mis-mating
Power signal separation: Motor power lines and sensor/encoder signal lines run in separate channels or are spaced/crossed at right angles, with the separation visible in routing geometry
Return path and grounding intent: Each electronics module states its grounding scheme (star point, chassis bond, isolated) and signal returns route alongside their signals
Board mounting and clearance: PCBs mount on standoffs with keep-out clearance to walls and moving parts, connector edges face access openings, and mounting holes match standard board patterns

verify.rule: All required fields and features are present.
Estimated mass does not exceed allocated budget.
Each required feature is mapped to specific geometry operations.
Adjacent interfaces are reciprocal with neighboring subsystems.
Visible locking or preload evidence is missing for critical joints.

risk.desc: Missing visible locking evidence for critical joints may lead to loosening in orbit.
risk.mit: Add visible locking or preload evidence to critical joints.

risk.desc: Insufficient strain relief for cables may cause damage during deployment.
risk.mit: Ensure all cables have proper strain relief geometry.

risk.desc: Potential mis-mating of connectors due to lack of keying or labeling.
risk.mit: Implement keying or labeling on connectors to prevent mis-mating.

risk.desc: Power and signal lines sharing the same bundle may cause interference.
risk.mit: Separate power and signal lines in routing geometry.

risk.desc: Grounding scheme unspecified may lead to improper signal return paths.
risk.mit: Specify grounding scheme and ensure signal returns alongside signals.

physics_paths.description: RF signal path from radio board to external antenna
Deploy mechanism path from hinge to antenna slot
Thermal dissipation from deployer to antenna slot

physics_paths: Load path: Structural loads from thrusters transferred to satellite structure via bracket.
Flow path: Propellant gas flows through plumbing manifold to thruster nozzles.
Thermal path: Heat dissipation from thrusters to bracket and satellite structure.
Service path: Access for maintenance and inspection through service cutouts.
integration_opportunities: Optimize bracket design for minimal weight while maintaining structural integrity.
Integrate plumbing manifold with thruster nozzles for efficient propellant distribution.
Ensure service cutouts provide adequate access for maintenance and inspection.

manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection and CMM for dimensional accuracy

verification_focus: Mass verification: Ensure final mass does not exceed budgeted 100g.
Structural integrity verification: Validate bracket's ability to withstand thruster loads.
Electrical connectivity verification: Confirm proper mating of connector pads.
